name: scamshield
description: ScamShield (unofficial): check-and-report scam app (Expo) + NestJS API, built on the mobile-platform template.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @app/scamshield && npm run typecheck -w @service/scamshield-api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @app/scamshield && npm run lint -w @service/scamshield-api
